heading: Hearings; rules and regulations; conclusiveness of determinations of Attorney General
label: 47d Hearings; rules and regulations; conclusiveness of determinations of Attorney General
notes: Amendments1974— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), substituted “Attorney General” for “Board as administering agent”, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 93–377
amendments: Amendments1974— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), substituted “Attorney General” for “Board as administering agent”, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 93–377

children.label: a
children.text: The Attorney General is authorized to hold such hearings and make, promulgate, issue, rescind, and amend such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this chapter.

children.label: b
children.text: A determination made by the Attorney General under shall be final and conclusive and no court shall have power or jurisdiction to review it.section 47b of this title
